title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 370.156 - Withdrawal applications voided, when
text:
370.156.  Withdrawal applications voided, when. — When the director takes charge of a credit union, all notices or applications of members for withdrawal of shares theretofore filed shall thereafter be of no force and effect; and any distribution to members of capital shall be pro rata to the participation value of their shares.
(L. 1967 p. 509)
